summary.lv: Tieto Banktech meklē Scrum Master, kurš vadīs Agile komandas banku pakalpojumu programmatūras izstrādē, nodrošinot efektīvu procesu un digitālo transformāciju finanšu sektorā.
summary.en: Tieto Banktech is looking for a Scrum Master to lead Agile teams in banking software development, ensuring efficient processes and digital transformation in the financial sector.
